advantage.title: Why We Are Different.
advantage.years_exp_desc: Operating with local teams on both sides of the border since 2012.
advantage.impact_desc: More than just numbers; we build lifelong career trajectories.
advantage.point_01_desc: Our leadership hasn't just studied these markets; they've built lives and businesses in them. We understand the unspoken rules of negotiation in Beijing and the academic rigors of New Delhi. This cultural dual-citizenship is our greatest asset.
advantage.point_02_desc: Unlike boutique agencies that focus only on education or logistics, we provide an ecosystem. A student today is a trade partner tomorrow. A tourist today is an investor tomorrow. We manage the full lifecycle of your global journey.
advantage.point_03_desc: You aren't just paying for paperwork. You are buying access to a verified network of university deans, trade commissioners, and logistics hubs. We've spent a decade filtering for reliability so you don't have to.

pillars_deep.edu_desc: We specialize in securing medical and engineering seats in Asia's highest-ranked institutions. Our packages include tuition-free opportunities, world-class dormitories, and complete career counseling.
pillars_deep.tourism_desc: Experience Asia beyond the brochures. From specialized student educational tours to high-end heritage circuits, we curate travel that educates and inspires.
pillars_deep.trade_desc: Bridge the manufacturing and supply chain gap between India and China. We provide sourcing, quality control, and logistics management for businesses looking to scale internationally.

testimonial.quote: "RouteToAbroad didn't just find me a university; they found me a future. The scholarship coverage for my MBBS at Peking University was seamless, and the on-ground support made China feel like home."

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Is Chinese MBBS recognized in my country?
faq.a1: Yes, all universities we represent are listed in the WHO World Directory of Medical Schools and are recognized by major national medical councils like PMDC, NMC, and ECFMG.
faq.a2: Many of our partner universities offer fully funded scholarships covering tuition, accommodation, and a monthly stipend through the CSC (China Scholarship Council) program. Partial scholarships are also available based on academic merit.
faq.q3: What are the Chinese language requirements?
faq.a3: Most English-taught programs (MBBS, Engineering) do not require Chinese proficiency at enrollment. However, students are required to pass HSK 4 before clinical rotations. We provide HSK preparation courses as part of our support package.
faq.q4: How long does the visa process take?
faq.a4: The typical visa process takes 4-8 weeks from the time you receive your JW202 form. We guide you through every step including document preparation, embassy appointment scheduling, and interview preparation.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do visas for China work?
faq.a1: We provide full concierge support for visa applications. Whether you need a Tourist (L) or Business (M) visa, our team handles the documentation, invitation letters, and filing process to ensure a smooth approval.
faq.q2: When is the best time to visit East Asia?
faq.a2: Spring (March–May) for cherry blossoms and Autumn (September–November) for temperate weather and fall foliage are generally considered the best times for general tourism.
faq.q3: Can you arrange high-level business meetings?
faq.a3: Yes. Through our Trade arm, we have access to various industry hubs and can arrange factory tours, government meetings, and local chamber of commerce introductions.
faq.a4: Your guide will be briefed on any allergies or dietary preferences (Vegan, Halal, Gluten-Free). We pre-vet all restaurants and provide "preference cards" in the local language.
faq.a5: Standard travel insurance is not included in the base price, but we offer a comprehensive "Digital Diplomat" coverage add-on that includes medical evacuation and high-value equipment protection.

faq.title: Trade Intel
faq.description: Quick answers to common questions about cross-border commerce.
faq.q1: What is the Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ)?
faq.a1: MOQs vary by industry. Typically, for custom electronics it starts at 500-1000 units, while for industrial machinery it can be a single unit. We specialize in negotiating MOQs for growing businesses.
faq.q2: How do you ensure Quality Assurance?
faq.a2: Our inspectors are on the factory floor during production and before sealing the container. We follow AQL standard (Acceptable Quality Limit) protocols.
faq.q3: What are the typical shipping timeframes?
faq.a3: Air freight takes 3-7 days. Sea freight from China ports to Mumbai or Mundra typically takes 18-25 days depending on the service route.
faq.q4: Can you handle Customs and BIS certifications?
faq.a4: Yes, we provide full support for BIS, WPC, and other regulatory filings required by the Indian government for specific electronic imports.
faq.a5: Standard terms are 30% deposit via TT and 70% against Bill of Lading. For established enterprise clients, we can facilitate LC (Letter of Credit) arrangements.
faq.q6: Do you support OEM and Private Labeling?
faq.a6: Absolutely. We help you find factories that specialize in white-labeling and can manage the branding and packaging customization process for you.

info.quote: "A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single conversation."
info.quote_desc: Connect with our local experts today and let us simplify your global transition. We're not just consultants; we're your partners in East Asian growth.

hero.title: We don't just connect countries. We connect people.
hero.description: Bridging horizons through dedicated pathways in education, tourism, and global trade. Our journey is defined by the lives we transform across borders.

story.p1: Founded on the principle of seamless global mobility, RouteToAbroad began as a vision to simplify the complexities of international transitions. We recognized that behind every visa application, trade agreement, or travel itinerary, there is a human ambition seeking growth.
story.quote1: Our mission has never been about the distance traveled, but the depth of the connection established. We build corridors of opportunity that empower individuals to dream beyond their local maps.
story.p2: As we expanded into Education, Tourism, and Trade, our core philosophy remained unchanged: transparency and integrity. In an era of automated responses, we prioritize personalized guidance that respects the unique narrative of every client.
story.quote2: Navigating international waters requires more than just logistics; it requires empathy. We act as the digital diplomat for those venturing into new territories, ensuring they never feel like a stranger.
story.p3: Today, RouteToAbroad stands as a multi-pillar institution, serving as a trusted partner for students, entrepreneurs, and explorers worldwide. We continue to innovate our processes while staying rooted in our founding promise of human-centric global service.

values.v1_desc: We view every client engagement as a long-term partnership, prioritizing trust and mutual growth over short-term gains.
values.v2_desc: Understanding both the origin and destination cultures allows us to facilitate smoother transitions and deeper integrations.
values.v3_desc: Compliance and ethical rigor are non-negotiable. We take the right path, ensuring security and peace of mind for our clients.
